boundary_binding.action_boundary: May operations activate the production device group?
boundary_binding.allow_rule_assessment: No. CP-77 calibration pack pending; calibration-status class not verified.
boundary_binding.controlling_source_fact: STD-GAC-087-P mandates calibration-status class match before activation; CP-77 calibration pack pending per CAL-GAC-087.
boundary_binding.escalate_rule_assessment: STD-GAC-087-P requires calibration-status class closure; CAL-GAC-087 shows CP-77 pending—status-class trap unresolved.
boundary_binding.timing_scope_authority_dependency_check: Timing, scope, authority match per CAL-GAC-087 for GD-4/Site P2/RC-12/2026-06-28, but dependency (calibration-status class) unmet.

final_answer: Action may not proceed. CAL-GAC-087 shows CP-77 calibration pack pending, and STD-GAC-087-P requires a verified calibration-status class before activation. WARN-GAC-087 reinforces that calibration status must be separately verified. The source boundary remains open due to this unresolved status-class trap, requiring escalation for resolution prior to any production device group activation.
